title: Star Wars Planet Stellaris
description: Explore the beautiful and vast universe of Star Wars !
body:
![star wars planets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/338718bd1cc1715477c5d4000528792c1ba1e4cc_0.webp)

Explore the beautiful and vast universe of Star Wars !


**Require Stellaris**

You need help, you have a bug that you want to report to us or you just want to speak with nice people ? Join our discord server :  https://discord.gg/Xb2nPmN

![Get 25% off when you buy a server on Bisect Hosting with the code "Stellaris"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b37b59fac9edef3672434614d4645828d454f1e.png)


Key features :
- Explore 5 new planets for Star Wars : Tatooine, Endor, Hoth, Mustafar & Mandalore
- Fighting with 5 differents lightsabers
- Fight against your friend with the blaster
- Discover new structures
- New mobs directly from your favorite movie




Modpacks: Feel free to put this mod in your modpack, no need to ask!
